title: Nexus Realm
description: A Vanilla Plus modpack with quality-of-life tweaks for a smoother, enhanced Minecraft experience.
body:
![NEXUS REALM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6209ce5e9f3f293e14f92be01311c34d952ca8e.png)

Nexus Realm is a Vanilla Plus 1.21 modpack that enhances your Minecraft experience with quality-of-life improvements with way more optimization. It keeps the game close to its original feel while adding features that make gameplay smoother, more enjoyable and as lightweight as the vanilla Minecraft. You’ll find performance tweaks, built-in support for shaders, extra resource pack options, and even a zoom feature. Plus, it offers easy world hosting with Essential. 

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76e62fe2a0464f4ded6b18dbbab8d3f3b4b6da2a.png)

 ✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation (Geophilic)

 ✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

 ✔️ New Items and Mobs

 ✔️ Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures (Explorify, Repurposed Structures, ...)

 ✔️ QoL Features such as Waystones

 ✔️ Xaero's Minimap with Additional Features
 
 ✔️ 76 Mods


![Page end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12f4d171f2ecacb5a14a42952bdd2556994c3817.png)
